chunks.text: I was discussing the Sunday picnic with my sister.
we would spend the day in a meadow by the river.
" If it rains, we will watch a movie at home.
" " Unless it rains, we will leave the house at ten in the morning.
" We discussed several conditions and made them into a certain plan.
Tomorrow morning, unless the sky is totally black, we will go as planned.
If it does rain, however, we will shift the picnic to the afternoon.
Whenever the forecast improves, our spirits rise with it.
Although mother was tired, she said she would prepare sandwiches.
The sight of sandwiches filling an entire basket is always a pleasant one.
As the day approached, my sister's face remained calm.
The fact that everything would depend on the weather gathered our family together in a quiet way.
